svg.title: UML Class Diagram
svg.desc: UML class diagram showing the classes, methods, and relationships in the ML trading system
svg.text: metrics: {ticker, total_return_pct, sharpe_ratio, max_drawdown, win_rate_pct, train_roc_auc, ...}
trades: list[{date, ticker, action, shares, price, pnl, confidence}]
